blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,198 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
